name: OneClick Virtualization Project
description: Agent skills for discovering virtualization guides, documentation, and developer resources

skills.name: virtualization-guides
skills.description: Browse virtualization platform guides including OneClickVirt, Proxmox VE, Incus, Docker, LXD, Containerd, Podman, QEMU, and KubeVirt

skills.name: practical-cases
skills.description: Practical use cases and tutorials including server testing, automation, and system optimization

skills.name: developer-docs
skills.description: Developer documentation including localization (l10n) guides and project structure

skills.name: api-catalog
skills.description: RFC 9727 API catalog with service descriptions and documentation links

skills.name: github-repository
skills.description: GitHub repository containing source code and issue tracking

skills.name: sitemap
skills.description: XML sitemap for crawling all available pages

skills.name: robots-rules
skills.description: Robots.txt with AI crawler rules, content signals, and crawl policies (RFC 9309)

skills.name: mcp-server-card
skills.description: MCP Server Card for tool discovery and integration
